title: Introduction to Mobile App Development & Development Environment Setup
description:
Objective

The first week introduces interns to the mobile application development ecosystem, development workflow, project structure, IDE setup, emulator configuration, responsive UI principles and clean coding standards. By the end of the week interns will have a fully configured development environment and build their first multi-screen application.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Introduction to Mobile App Development
  • Flutter SDK & Android Studio Setup
  • Project Structure
  • Widgets & Layouts
  • Navigation Basics
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Installing Flutter SDK and Android Studio
  • Creating Flutter projects
  • Understanding StatelessWidget and StatefulWidget
  • Responsive layouts using Row, Column, Expanded and Stack
  • Navigation using Navigator and Routes
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Official Documentation – [https://docs.flutter.dev](https://docs.flutter.dev)
  • Flutter Complete Course – [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPvVD8t02U8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPvVD8t02U8)

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Portfolio App UI

Build a responsive portfolio application with Splash Screen, Home, About and Contact screens. Use reusable widgets, proper folder structure and navigation between all pages.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Responsive Portfolio App Source Code.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will understand Flutter project structure, navigation, layouts, widgets and responsive UI development while successfully creating and running their first mobile application.

title: State Management, Forms & Local Database
description:
Objective

This week focuses on managing application state, handling user input, validating forms and storing data locally. Interns will create applications capable of performing CRUD operations while following clean architecture principles.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • State Management
  • Forms & Validation
  • Shared Preferences
  • SQLite/Hive Basics
  • CRUD Operations
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Managing dynamic UI state
  • Form validation using Form Widget
  • Controllers and input handling
  • Local database integration
  • Search and filtering records
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Forms Cookbook – [https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/forms](https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/forms)
  • Hive Database Tutorial – [https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+hive+tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+hive+tutorial)

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Notes Management App

Develop a Notes Management application with Create, Read, Update and Delete functionality using local database, search feature and form validation.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Fully functional CRUD Notes App.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will confidently implement forms, validation, state management, local databases and CRUD operations in mobile applications.

title: REST APIs, Networking & Authentication
description:
Objective

This week teaches interns how to communicate with backend services through REST APIs, parse JSON responses, handle asynchronous operations and implement secure authentication workflows.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • REST APIs
  • HTTP Requests
  • Authentication
  • JSON Parsing
  • Error Handling
2. Detailed Concepts
  • GET POST PUT DELETE requests
  • Future Async Await
  • Loading states
  • Token management basics
  • Secure API communication
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Networking – [https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/networking](https://docs.flutter.dev/cookbook/networking)
  • REST API Tutorial – [https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+rest+api+tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+rest+api+tutorial)

Practical Implementation

Project Task: News Reader Application

Integrate a public REST API, display categorized news, implement search, loading indicators, authentication screens and proper error handling.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • API integrated News Application.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will understand API integration, asynchronous programming, authentication and real-world networking in mobile applications.

title: Firebase Integration & Cloud Services
description:
Objective

This week introduces Firebase services including Authentication, Firestore Database, Cloud Storage and Push Notifications. Interns will learn how cloud services enhance mobile applications.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Firebase Setup
  • Firebase Authentication
  • Cloud Firestore
  • Firebase Storage
  • Push Notifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Email and Google Authentication
  • Realtime Database Operations
  • Uploading Images
  • Firestore CRUD
  • Firebase Cloud Messaging basics
Learning Resources:
  • Firebase Documentation – [https://firebase.google.com/docs](https://firebase.google.com/docs)
  • Flutter Firebase Course – [https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+firebase+tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+firebase+tutorial)

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Firebase Chat Application

Build a simple chat application using Firebase Authentication and Firestore. Users should register, login, exchange realtime messages and upload profile images.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Working Firebase Chat Application.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will gain experience integrating Firebase Authentication, Firestore, Storage and realtime cloud services into production-ready mobile applications.

title: Advanced State Management & Clean Architecture
description:
Objective

This week focuses on writing scalable and maintainable mobile applications by implementing Clean Architecture principles, repository pattern and advanced state management. Interns will learn how to separate business logic from UI for professional application development.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Clean Architecture
  • Repository Pattern
  • Provider / Riverpod / Bloc Overview
  • Dependency Injection
  • Reusable Components
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Feature-based folder structure
  • Business logic separation
  • Managing complex application state
  • Reusable services and utilities
  • Application scalability
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Architecture Guide – https://docs.flutter.dev/app-architecture
  • Riverpod Documentation – https://riverpod.dev

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Refactor Previous Applications

Refactor one of your previous projects using Clean Architecture. Move business logic into providers or repositories, create reusable services and optimize project structure for scalability.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Application following Clean Architecture.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will understand scalable architecture, advanced state management and maintainable application development practices.

title: Device Features & Third-Party Package Integration
description:
Objective

This week introduces device hardware integration and third-party Flutter packages. Interns will learn how to access mobile capabilities such as camera, gallery, GPS, permissions and local notifications.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Camera Integration
  • Image Picker
  • Location Services
  • Permissions
  • Local Notifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Capturing images
  • Uploading profile photos
  • GPS and Maps basics
  • Permission handling
  • Notification scheduling
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Packages – https://pub.dev
  • Flutter Camera Tutorial – https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=flutter+camera+tutorial

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Travel Diary Application

Develop a Travel Diary app allowing users to capture photos, attach GPS location, save entries locally and schedule reminder notifications.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Working Travel Diary App.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will integrate device hardware, permissions and third-party packages into real-world applications.

title: Performance Optimization, Testing & Debugging
description:
Objective

Interns will optimize application performance, perform debugging, improve responsiveness and learn software testing techniques to deliver stable production-ready mobile applications.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Performance Optimization
  • Debugging
  • Unit Testing
  • Widget Testing
  • Error Logging
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Flutter DevTools
  • Reducing unnecessary rebuilds
  • Memory optimization
  • Testing UI components
  • Handling runtime exceptions
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Testing Documentation – https://docs.flutter.dev/testing
  • Flutter DevTools – https://docs.flutter.dev/tools/devtools

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Optimize Existing Mobile Application

Improve the performance of your previous projects by optimizing widgets, reducing rebuilds, fixing bugs, writing widget tests and documenting performance improvements.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Performance optimized application with testing report.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will learn debugging, application optimization, testing strategies and professional quality assurance practices.

title: Final Capstone Project, Deployment & Portfolio Preparation
description:
Objective

The final week combines all previously learned concepts into a complete production-ready mobile application. Interns will deploy their application, prepare documentation and present their project for final evaluation.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Project Planning
  • Deployment
  • Release APK Generation
  • GitHub Documentation
  • Project Presentation
2. Detailed Concepts
  • End-to-end application development
  • Preparing release builds
  • Portfolio best practices
  • Documentation standards
  • Professional project presentation
Learning Resources:
  • Flutter Deployment Guide – https://docs.flutter.dev/deployment/android
  • GitHub Docs – https://docs.github.com

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Complete Mobile Application Capstone

Develop a complete production-ready mobile application with authentication, API integration, Firebase, local storage, responsive UI, testing and deployment. Prepare release APK, documentation and presentation for final evaluation.

Deliverables

  • Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Final production-ready application with release APK.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will complete an industry-level portfolio project, understand deployment workflows, present technical work professionally and demonstrate job-ready mobile application development skills.
